nasb.text: But at midnight there was a shout, ‘Behold, the bridegroom! Come out to meet him.’

esv.text: But at midnight there was a cry, ‘Here is the bridegroom! Come out to meet him.’

cnv.text: 半夜，有人喊叫：‘新郎來了，快出來迎接他。’

ccb.text: “到了半夜，忽然听见有人喊道，‘新郎来了！出来迎接吧！’

csbs.text: “半夜里，有人喧嚷：‘看哪，是新郎！你们出来迎接他！’
